evaluation_protocol: within_subject: pretrained trunk + per-subject head fine-tune (75/25 chrono split)
loso: pretrain on N-1 subjects, zero-shot on held-out
baseline: OVR CSP (2 filters/class) + regularised LDA (shrinkage=0.1)
statistics: Wilcoxon signed-rank (per-subject, two-sided), effect size r

BNCI2014_001.description: BCI Comp IV 2a -- 9 subjects, 4-class MI, 22-ch, 250 Hz

BNCI2014_004.description: BCI Comp IV 2b -- 9 subjects, 2-class MI, 3-ch, 250 Hz
